title: Music Box The Improvised Comedy Musical
description: Step into a world where nothing is planned and everything is possible. Music Box takes your suggestions and turns them into a brand new, completely improvised comedy musical - songs, plot twists, dodgy choreography and all! No two shows are ever the same but whatever happens, it’s made up on the spot, powered by your ideas and our questionable decision-making. Come help us create the next hit...or at least something delightfully unhinged. ★★★★★ “This one’s brilliant” (Fringe Guru) ★★★★★ “Lively, sharp, superior improvised fun!” (Remote Goat)
